description: Agent definitions. Each agent has scoped skills and tools. Change model with one edit.

agents.name: Vibes
agents.description: Your key agent for updates, briefings, ROI analysis, and strategic decisions. Has full visibility into project state.
agents.notes: Sits above orchestrator. Human's primary interface to VibePilot.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.description: Routes tasks based on availability, historical performance, and learned patterns. Tracks success rates, costs, model strengths. Gets smarter every day.
agents.notes: Strategic brain. Works with Researcher to incorporate new intelligence.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Monitors new models, approaches, platform changes. Feeds intelligence to Orchestrator. Weekly briefings to Vibes. Keeps VibePilot current.
agents.notes: How VibePilot evolves. Works with Orchestrator for continuous improvement.

agents.name: Consultant
agents.description: Works with human to clarify vision, gather requirements, and produce complete PRD.
agents.notes: Starts every project. May use courier platforms for free tier access.

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Takes PRD and produces executable task graph with confidence scores.
agents.notes: Needs codebase access for accurate planning. Uses Kimi CLI subscription.

agents.name: Council
agents.description: Reviews proposed solutions from architecture, security, and maintenance perspectives.
agents.notes: Can approve, reject, or request changes. Uses courier platforms.

agents.name: Supervisor
agents.description: Verifies output matches prompt, sends to testers, handles pass/fail. Merge or reassign with WHY + WHAT TO FIX notes.
agents.notes: Quality gate. Orchestrator handles routing/limits. Supervisor handles output validation.

agents.name: Courier
agents.description: Executes tasks on web AI platforms. Returns chat_url for future revisions.
agents.notes: No codebase access. Only receives prompt packet. CORE execution method.

agents.name: Internal CLI
agents.description: Executes tasks via Kimi or OpenCode CLI. Has full codebase access.

agents.name: Internal API
agents.description: Executes tasks via API. Has codebase access. Use sparingly.
agents.notes: API costs money. DeepSeek has $2 credit. Gemini API is free.

agents.name: Code Tester
agents.description: Runs tests, lint, typecheck on generated code.
agents.notes: Uses your OpenCode subscription. Fast and capable.

agents.name: Maintenance
agents.description: ONLY agent that touches system files. Implements after Council + Supervisor approval. Sandbox tests everything. Exit-ready always.
agents.notes: No approval = no change. Researcher suggests, Maintenance implements.
